name: commitments-goals
goal: Add goalSlug to commitments, show in CLI, allow manual linking during extraction.

userStories.title: Add goalSlug to Commitment type
userStories.description: Add optional goalSlug field to Commitment type and ensure persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `goalSlug?: string` field to `Commitment` type in entities.ts
Update `CommitmentsFile` type to include goalSlug in serialization
Existing commitments.json files remain valid (field is optional)

userStories.title: Update CLI commitments list
userStories.description: Show goalSlug in CLI output when present.
acceptanceCriteria: When goalSlug present: `[Q1-2] Send proposal to Acme (@jane, i_owe_them, 3d)`
When goalSlug absent: output unchanged (no empty brackets)
Update table/list formatting for both modes
Unit test: output format with and without goalSlug

userStories.title: Manual goal linking during extraction
userStories.description: Allow users to link action items to goals during staged extraction approval.
acceptanceCriteria: During `arete meeting approve`, after showing action items, offer goal selection
Show available goals from `goals/*.md` (active status only)
Selection UI: numbered list [1] Q1-2 ... [n] None
If no goals exist, skip with message: 'No active goals found'
Store selected goalSlug on committed commitments
For 1-2 goals, use inline prompt: 'Link to Q1-2? [y/N]'
Update backend approval workflow to pass goalSlug through
